channel.title: Devops on goshSAMit
channel.description: Recent content in Devops on goshSAMit

item.title: Terraform with Proxmox
item.description: The Problem There is no specific problem from this. I started using Terraform at work with Google Cloud and wanted some more practice with it. The Approach A. Install Terraform I am starting this development on Ubuntu, Hashicorp’s website has detailed instructions for downloading on different operating systems. First step, as always with Linux, is to update your package manager. sudo apt update Terraform then requires the download of gnupg and software-property-commons packages.
